name: Ran Yakumo
description:
NEEDY MOMMY WOOOOWIEEE 🗣🗣🗣🗣🔥🔥🔥🔥🔥

Hello everybody how are y'all? I hope you are very well anyway, let's go back to the Touhou characters this time, Ran Yakumo and she is in needy for some company due the loneliness. Are you going to help her feel better or what are you going to do with her?

Art by: kashu (hizake)
creator: Juanito_Alcachofa
